text:
The home page link in pkg-descr WWW: https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Documentation/mmc/mmc-tools.txt ends in HTTP 404:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/sysutils/mmc-utils/pkg-descr?view=markup

Alternative home page: 

WWW: https://www.kernel.org/doc/Documentation/mmc/mmc-tools.txt
